sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114433" key="xoriambiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορῐαμβ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n114433.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">choriambic,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέτρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:9:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.26</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
